description: No unified logging system — logger.debug/info/error scattered without unified schema or structured format
proposed_solution: Adopt structlog or python-json-logger with unified schema for each layer

description: No tracing linking requests across L3→L8 — correlation_id exists in TransportContext but is not actually used for OTel span/trace
proposed_solution: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation middleware at L7 entry point (FabricClient.send/receive) and pass context through layers

description: No metrics (message count latency percentiles error rate per protocol active sessions)
proposed_solution: Add Prometheus client with counters/gauges/histograms for each layer

description: No logging of incoming/outgoing messages for audit and compliance purposes
proposed_solution: Add optional AuditLogger enabled via config — logs source

description: No unified error schema across protocols — each protocol handler returns errors in different formats
proposed_solution: Create ErrorResponse Pydantic model with code
appropriate_location: timestamp; unify across all protocol handlers

description: correlation_id passes through TransportContext in every request but is not injected into logs — cannot link log entries to specific requests
proposed_solution: Add logging.Filter or setLogRecordFactory to inject correlation_id/session_id from context vars into every log record
